name: Phase 2 Expansion - AI Education Sections
objective: Add 5 new educational sections: QuickStart, Glossary, Scaling Laws, Open Source Models, Image Generation
exit_criteria: QuickStart section added with learning path overview
Glossary section added with searchable A-Z and links
Scaling Laws section added covering compute scaling, emergent capabilities, Chinchilla law
Open Source Models section added covering Llama, Mistral, Gemma, DeepSeek
Image Generation section added covering DALL-E, Stable Diffusion, SDXL, Flux
All sections follow existing visual style (purple accent, dark mode, 1126px container)
